name: Walnut Orange Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 pound Mixed fresh greens (half Spinach and half Romaine Works best)
1 cup Toasted Walnut Halves (chopped into smaller pieces if desired)
recipeInstructions:
1. At least 1 1/2 hours before serving, peel and section the oranges using a serrated knife or citrus knife.
2. Remove the membrane lining from each orange segment.
3. Place the oranges in a bowl and squeeze all excess juice from the remaining lining over the oranges. Discard any membrane and seeds if necessary.
4. Drizzle honey and sprinkle cinnamon over oranges, cover, and let stand at room temperature for at least 1 hour.
5. Clean greens and pat dry. Break into bite-sized pieces and toss well with onions, radishes, and nuts in a large bowl.
6. Drizzle olive oil over the salad and toss to distribute evenly.
7. Season to taste with salt and freshly ground pepper.
8. Just before serving, add the oranges and their liquid. Mix thoroughly.
